结节病.summary: 度普利尤单抗可能通过改变Th1/Th2平衡诱发罕见类结节病反应，停药后预后良好。

结节病.title: When the lung is at risk: diagnosis, manifestations, and complications of pulmonary sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Dhanani Z, Vorselaars AD, Gupta R, Spagnolo P
结节病.summary: 肺结节病可进展为纤维化、气道病变和肺动脉高压，需个体化阶梯治疗，甲氨蝶呤可替代泼尼松。

结节病.title: Diagnosis and Management of Sarcoidosis-like Reaction in Adjuvant Immunotherapy: A Comprehensive Review and Clinical Implications.
结节病.authors: Lee M, Cai Q, Wang J
结节病.summary: 辅助免疫治疗中类结节病反应需与肿瘤复发鉴别，通常无需停药，可继续监测或使用糖皮质激素。

结节病.title: Can Systemic Sarcoidosis and Genetic Cardiomyopathy Coexist?
结节病.authors: Wagle AA, Gupta R, Karatela M, Murray B, Gilotra NA, Scheel PJ 3rd
结节病.summary: 系统性结节病与遗传性心肌病可共存，但心脏影像学特异性有限，需个体化评估炎症是否导致心律失常或心室功能障碍。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Dato-DXd在一线奥希替尼耐药后EGFR突变晚期NSCLC中显示有效，缓解率43%，中位无进展生存期9.5-11.7个月。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路是罕见遗传性间质性肺病（SAVI和COPA综合征）的致病关键，但其在普通类型ILD中的作用仍不清楚。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: 联合免疫抑制治疗对特定表型的系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病有效。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: 新型EGFR-HER3双抗ADC药物在EGFR突变NSCLC中显示47.4%客观缓解率和良好安全性。

ILD.title: Anticancer drug-induced interstitial lung disease: a critical appraisal of clinical practice guidelines and consensus statements.
ILD.authors: Zhang Y, Ma Z, Sun X, Zhang Y, Zhu M, Zhang S, Feng X, An Z
ILD.summary: 抗癌药物相关间质性肺病诊疗指南质量参差不齐，类固醇方案推荐存在显著不一致。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: screening, diagnosis, and treatment-an expert group consensus statement.
ILD.authors: Solomon JJ, Dieude P, Matson SM, Lee JS, Rojas-Serrano J, Sebastiani M, Gonzalez A, Demoruelle MK, Hoffman-Vold AM, Kam MLW, Swigris JJ, Sparks JA, Brown KK, Cottin V, Kellermeyer LM, Wilson KC, Waseda Y, Crestani B, Walsh SLF, Poletti V, Doyle T, Koduri G, Kelly C, Danoff S, Dellaripa PF
ILD.summary: 该专家共识提供了类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病的筛查、诊断和治疗临床指导建议。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关性肺炎虽罕见但致命，需尽早识别并管理，尤其注意高危人群。

ILD.title: Combination therapy with mycophenolate mofetil, nintedanib, and tocilizumab in a patient with progressive systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease : A case report and a literature review.
ILD.authors: Chen L, Li X, Huang D, Chen P, Xu P, Chen H, Zhang X
ILD.summary: 吗替麦考酚酯、尼达尼布和托珠单抗联合治疗可有效控制进行性系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Nanomedicine-enabled ferroptosis intervention:from antitumor effects to immune remodeling in lung diseases.
ILD.authors: Zhang Y, Huang W, Zhu K, Si Q, Wang T, Qin Y
ILD.summary: 纳米药物调控铁死亡通过免疫重塑实现肺癌治疗和肺疾病干预的双向调控。

ILD.title: Childhood Interstitial Lung Disease-Successful Application of a Stepwise Diagnostic Classification.
ILD.authors: Rapp CK, Griese M
ILD.summary: 该三步分类法可有效诊断儿童间质性肺病，遗传检测确诊率达50.8%。

ILD.title: Linking childhood interstitial lung disease to IARS-related disorder: clinical and preliminary functional studies in four new cases.
ILD.authors: Dai D, Zhou W, Jiang G, Guo Z, Wang H, Chen J, Mei M, Lu Y, Wang L, Qian L
ILD.summary: IARS基因双等位致病突变是儿童间质性肺病伴肺蛋白沉积症的新病因。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Mycobacterium avium complex pulmonary disease in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease under non-biologic immunomodulatory therapy: A case report.
ILD.authors: Tang R, Wang R, Han Y
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎合并间质性肺病患者在非生物免疫调节治疗中可能出现鸟胞内分枝杆菌肺病。

ILD.title: Imaging Spectrum of Childhood Interstitial Lung Diseases: Focus on Disorders Not Specific to Infancy.
ILD.authors: Ikeda O, Tsujioka Y, Nishimura G, Yamada Y, Sugiura H, Nishi E, Shimizu K, Kono T, Jinzaki M
ILD.summary: 儿童间质性肺病影像学分类中，高分辨率CT对非婴儿期疾病诊断起核心作用。

ILD.title: Assessment of disease severity in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease using a modified lung ultrasound score: correlation with pulmonary function, HRCT, and clinical scores, and evaluation of diagnostic efficacy.
ILD.authors: Li Y, Chen Y, Zhang X, Lyu G, Hong W
ILD.summary: 改良肺超声评分可有效评估系统性硬化相关间质性肺病严重程度，与HRCT、肺功能及临床评分高度相关。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎易合并快速进展性间质性肺病且预后差，三联疗法可改善结局。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 肺泡表面活性物质成熟障碍可导致新生儿呼吸衰竭和成人间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Cutaneous manifestations in myositis syndromes.
ILD.authors: Schedler NC, Raheel O, de la Garza JAC, Edminister JR
ILD.summary: 肌炎综合征皮肤表现与特定自身抗体和间质性肺病风险相关。

ILD.title: IRF5 promotes the polarization of M1 macrophages and aggravates pulmonary inflammation in connective tissue disease-related interstitial lung disease (CTD-ILD) by regulating IFN-beta.
ILD.authors: Chen S, Ming Q, Yi L, Wang X
ILD.summary: IRF5通过结合IFN-β启动子促进M1巨噬细胞极化，加重CTD-ILD肺部炎症。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 整合临床、剂量和炎症数据的机器学习模型能准确预测肺间质病肺癌患者放射性肺炎风险。
